items.title: Talks on Russia-Ukraine War Enter 2nd Day in Geneva
items.description: The discussions in Geneva were expected to focus on Ukrainian-held territory in the east that Russia wants to control as the price of peace. Kyiv has ...

items.title: Ski Mountaineering Makes Its Olympic Debut at the Milan-Cortina Winter Games
items.description: Ski mountaineering tests strength and endurance as athletes race uphill on skis and on foot before going back down.

items.title: Botswana’s ‘Corn Lady’ Finds Fame With Food Stands
items.description: Tshephiso Marumo has had success selling traditional village food in Botswana. But as she has risen, she has become more outspoken, inviting backlash.

items.title: Alberto Tomba Was an ’80s and ’90s Icon. The Olympics Have Brought Him Back.
items.description: Nicknamed “Tomba la Bomba,” the Italian skier was a global superstar before he drifted from the limelight. Decades later, the Winter Games have given ...

items.title: A Road Trip from Kandahar to Kabul on Highway 1 in Afghanistan
items.description: Life and business are back along a road once defined by war damage. But even with improved security, Afghans are desperate for jobs and development.
